title: EU Ecolabel
description: Voluntary EU environmental label showing your products meet strict environmental criteria across their lifecycle.
requirements: Apply via SMK (NL), meet criteria for product category, annual fees

title: EU Energy Labelling & Ecodesign
description: Mandatory energy labels and ecodesign requirements for electrical appliances. Essential for legal sales.
requirements: CE marking, correct labelling, meet ecodesign standards

title: LIFE Clean Energy Transition Calls 2026
description: EU LIFE 2026 call funding for clean energy transition projects, including industry and project development assistance.
relevance: High for businesses and project developers
requirements: Eligible organisation under LIFE call rules; application through EU Funding and Tenders Portal

title: Warm Homes Plan (UK)
description: UK-wide policy-backed support framework for home energy upgrades, including heat pumps, insulation, solar and support for low-income households.
relevance: High for homes and low-income support pathways
requirements: Eligibility depends on linked UK delivery schemes and local rollout criteria

title: Boiler Upgrade Scheme (BUS)
description: £7,500 grant towards air source heat pumps or biomass boilers to replace fossil fuel heating. Program funding was increased in April 2026.
requirements: EPC valid, replace fossil fuel heating

title: ECO4 Energy Company Obligation
description: Free or subsidised energy efficiency improvements funded by energy suppliers. Targets low-income and vulnerable households.

title: Great British Insulation Scheme
description: Free insulation for middle-income households in least energy efficient homes (EPC D-G). Covers cavity wall and loft insulation.

title: Home Upgrade Grant 2 (HUG2)
description: Up to £25,000 for energy efficiency upgrades for off-gas grid homes in England. Includes insulation, heat pumps, and solar.
requirements: Off-gas grid, low income, EPC D-G

title: Nest Wales Scheme
description: Free home energy improvements for eligible Welsh households. Includes boiler replacement, insulation, and renewable heating.
requirements: Wales resident, benefits or low income

title: Warmer Homes Scotland
description: Free heating and insulation improvements for qualifying Scottish households. Includes boilers, heat pumps, and insulation.

title: EV Chargepoint Grant
description: Up to £350 off home EV charger installation for renters, flat owners, and landlords.

title: Smart Export Guarantee (SEG)
description: Get paid for excess solar electricity exported to the grid. Energy suppliers must offer export tariffs.
requirements: Solar PV up to 5MW, smart meter

title: SEAI Heat Pump Grant
description: SEAI grant for heat pump installations under Better Energy Homes. Updated 2026 rates increase support levels by dwelling type.
requirements: Typically for homes built and occupied before 2021 with SEAI application and post-works BER compliance

title: SEAI Solar PV Grant
description: Up to €2,100 grant for solar PV installations. Covers panels and battery storage for Irish homes.

title: SEAI Insulation Grants
description: Grants for cavity wall, attic, and external wall insulation. €1,700-€6,000 depending on type.

title: SEAI One Stop Shop
description: Up to €25,000+ for whole-house deep retrofit to B2 BER rating through registered One Stop Shop providers.

title: SEAI Electric Vehicle Grant
description: Up to €3,500 grant for new electric vehicles plus €600 for home charger installation.

title: Warmer Homes Scheme Ireland
description: Free energy upgrades for qualifying low-income households. Includes insulation, heating controls.

title: SPVO - Responsible Business
description: Helps Dutch companies improve sustainability in international supply chains. Up to 70% funding.
relevance: Medium-High if you have international suppliers
requirements: NL establishment, partnership with local producers & NGO

title: Trade Relations Programme
description: Support for Dutch businesses with export and international collaboration.

title: DHI - Tech Demonstration
description: Support for SMEs with international ambitions to demonstrate technology.

title: Solar Energy Subsidy
description: Subsidy for solar panel installations for homes and businesses.

title: Wind Energy Funding
description: Funding support for wind energy projects including small turbines.
requirements: Project must be in NL, environmental assessment

title: EV Charging Infrastructure
description: Subsidy for installation of electric vehicle charging infrastructure.

title: Geothermal Heating Grant
description: Grant support for geothermal heat pump systems.

title: ISDE Scheme
description: Dutch ISDE investment subsidy for sustainable energy and energy-saving measures, with 2026 measure and budget updates.
relevance: High if you sell heat pumps, solar thermal, insulation
requirements: KVK number, product must be on devices list

title: EIA - Energy Investment Allowance
description: Tax deduction for companies investing in approved energy-efficient technologies under the annual Energy List.
requirements: Business investment must be on the official EIA Energy List

title: EIB Low Interest Loans
description: Long-term financing through European Investment Bank for major energy projects.

title: Smart Grid Technology Fund
description: Funding for smart grid technologies and energy management systems.

title: Water Efficiency Grants
description: Grants for water-efficient fixtures and systems.

title: Building Refurbishment Grant
description: Grants for major energy-efficient building renovations.

title: Circular Plastics NL
description: Funding for innovations in plastic recycling and circular plastics.

title: TSE Industry Sustainability
description: Grants for feasibility studies to make operations more sustainable.
relevance: Medium - Good for supply chain optimization

title: STEP & FEH Grants
description: Landlord incentives for improving energy efficiency in rental properties.

title: BAFA Heating Subsidies
description: Federal Office subsidies for heat pumps, biomass heating, and solar thermal. Up to 40% funding.
requirements: Replace old heating with renewable system

title: KfW Energy Efficiency Loans
description: KfW-backed support for energy-efficient renovation and heating transition, including current heating funding pathways.
maxFunding: Up to 70% support in relevant heating pathways

title: EEG Solar Feed-in Tariff
description: Guaranteed feed-in tariffs for solar PV installations. Fixed rates for 20 years.
requirements: Solar PV installation connected to grid

title: E-Mobility Subsidies
description: Federal subsidies for electric vehicles and charging infrastructure.
requirements: Electric vehicle or charging infrastructure purchase

title: GEEA Label Program
description: Group for Energy Efficient Appliances certification for top-tier electronics.

title: Industrial Energy Efficiency
description: BAFA funding for industrial energy audits and efficiency improvements.

title: MaPrimeRénov'
description: France's main energy renovation aid, with 2026 pathway changes between single-measure upgrades and major renovation tracks.
requirements: Main residence generally over 15 years old; 2026 modality rules apply by renovation pathway

title: CEE Energy Savings Certificates
description: Bonuses from energy suppliers for efficiency improvements. Stackable with MaPrimeRénov'.

title: Éco-PTZ (Green Loan)
description: Interest-free loan up to €50,000 for energy renovation works.

title: France Rénov' Advice
description: Free personalised advice service for home energy renovation.

title: Prime Adapt (Seniors)
description: Grant for home adaptations for elderly/disabled residents.

title: Solar Self-Consumption Bonus
description: Installation bonus for solar PV with self-consumption. €100-€500/kWp.

title: Wallonia Energy Primes
description: Regional Wallonia renovation and energy primes under the current temporary regime window (request cutoff September 2026).
requirements: Wallonia resident; audit and income conditions depend on work type

title: Flanders Energy Premium
description: Mijn VerbouwPremie support for renovations in Flanders, with reforms and adjusted amounts effective from March 2026.

title: Brussels RENOLUTION
description: Brussels region renovation premium program (RENOLUTION). Paused — 2026 continuation pending official decision; no open 2025/2026 application window yet.

title: Belgium EV Premium
description: Flanders zero-emission vehicle purchase premium (ended December 2024). Kept for reference — check current green mobility options in Flanders.

title: Belgium Solar Premium
description: Regional solar PV premiums vary by region. Includes battery storage support.

title: Belgium Green Loan
description: Low-interest renovation loans. 0% loans in some regions for energy improvements.

title: UCI Urban Rehabilitation
description: €46.5 million EIB financing program for urban energy upgrades.
requirements: Urban energy upgrade project in Spain

title: PERTE Clean Tech Manufacturing
description: €750 million fund for manufacturing clean tech in Spain.
requirements: Clean tech manufacturing facility in Spain

title: Self-Consumption Solar Aid
description: Subsidies for solar PV installations with battery storage. 40-45% of costs.
requirements: Solar PV installation with optional battery

title: PREE Building Renovation
description: Program for energy rehabilitation of existing buildings.

title: MOVES III Electric Mobility
description: Subsidies for EVs and charging infrastructure under successive MOVES call windows (region-administered). Latest listed window closed February 2026 — check IDAE for new calls.
requirements: EV or charging infrastructure purchase; eligibility varies by autonomous community

title: Renewable Thermal Energy
description: IDAE program supporting heat pumps, biomass boilers, and geothermal.

title: PRR Energy Transition
description: €1 billion Green Deal funding through Portugal's Recovery and Resilience Plan.

title: Environmental Fund (Fundo Ambiental)
description: Grants for circular economy initiatives and building energy retrofits.

title: Solar PV + Battery Program
description: Residential solar panel subsidies with battery storage. Up to 50% funding.

title: Sustainable Buildings Program
description: Funding for energy-efficient windows, insulation, heat pumps. Up to €7,500.

title: Electric Mobility Incentives
description: Subsidies for EVs and charging. €4,000 for BEV purchases.

title: Industrial Decarbonization
description: PT2030 funding for industrial energy efficiency and decarbonization.

title: Business.gov.nl — subsidies & schemes finder
description: Official Dutch government search hub for subsidies, grants, tax benefits, loans and EU programmes. Curated filter: environmental impact + products/innovation + international business (~80 schemes).
relevance: High — start here for NL grant discovery
requirements: Use filters on Business.gov.nl; check open vs closed status per scheme

title: MIA & Vamil — environmentally friendly investments
description: Dutch tax schemes for companies investing in environment-friendly business assets or technology (Environmental investment allowance and arbitrary depreciation).
relevance: High for equipment and retrofit capex
requirements: NL company; assets meet MIA/Vamil criteria; via Belastingdienst rules

title: Horizon Europe (NL)
description: EU framework for international research, technological development and innovation; Dutch businesses can participate via consortia.
relevance: High for innovation and cross-border R&D
requirements: Eligible organisation; consortium or single entity per call

title: WBSO — R&D tax credit
description: Lowers wage and other costs for R&D work carried out in the Netherlands (Wet vermindering afdracht loonbelasting en premie).
relevance: High for product and process innovation
requirements: R&D activities in NL; application to RVO

title: BMKB-Groen — SME green credit guarantee
description: Government-guaranteed loan scheme to help SMEs borrow for investments that make the business more sustainable and cut energy costs.
requirements: SME in NL; bank loan via BMKB-Groen framework

title: DEI+ — Demonstration Energy Innovation
description: Subsidy for projects that save energy, generate sustainable energy, or reduce CO2 — including demonstration of innovative equipment.
relevance: High for industrial kitchen and building energy projects
requirements: Project meets DEI+ criteria; apply via RVO when open

title: SPRILA — private EV charging at businesses
description: Subsidy for private charging infrastructure at business premises in the Netherlands.
requirements: Eligible charging investment; scheme rules via RVO

title: Flex-e — flexible power consumption
description: Helps businesses work around electricity grid congestion when growing or electrifying operations.
relevance: High where grid capacity limits expansion
requirements: Project addresses congestion workaround; apply when open

title: WIS — heat network investment subsidy
description: Investment subsidy for new heat networks (district/block heating) to support gas-free homes and sites.

title: MIT — SME innovation stimulus
description: SME Innovation Stimulus for Regional and Top Sectors — joint innovative projects between SMEs.

title: Dutch Good Growth Fund (DGGF)
description: Financing for Dutch SMEs investing in upcoming or developing markets.
requirements: Dutch SME; eligible country and project

title: Dutch Trade and Investment Fund (DTIF)
description: Funding support when arranging financing for doing business abroad is difficult.

title: VEKI — accelerated climate investments industry
description: Subsidy to reduce industrial CO2 by investing in equipment, systems or techniques when payback is long.
requirements: Industrial business in NL; project criteria

title: Innovation box (corporate tax)
description: Reduced effective tax rate on profits from qualifying innovative activities.
